title: Single-node capacity guarantee request
scenario: An architecture review meeting asks whether a single service node with 32 CPU cores and 128 GB RAM can guarantee support for 10,000 concurrent users for a newly launched SaaS product. Current workload telemetry is incomplete, and no production-like load test has been performed.
constraints: Do not provide guaranteed capacity claims without measurement.
Include concrete next measurements needed for a decision.
required_facts: Capacity depends on workload profile, latency targets, and downstream dependencies.
A benchmark or load test is required before guarantees.
Any recommendation must note uncertainty and risk.
